description: Detects race condition risks in C#: field declarations that may be shared state in concurrent contexts (Dictionary, List, HashSet without thread safety). JSON version matches all field declarations (cannot verify concurrent context or check for Concurrent/Immutable types without #match? predicate support). Simplified per D-07.

flag.message: Field declaration detected -- verify this field is not a non-thread-safe collection (Dictionary, List, HashSet) used in concurrent context; use ConcurrentDictionary or lock
